todos.content: Fix gas: estimateGas creates a new publicClient on every call — cache it and run estimation in parallel with prepareWrite
Fix gas: estimateGas uses eth_estimateGas which can underestimate for complex calls — use simulateContract gasUsed instead when available
Fix latency: handleChainSwitch has a hardcoded 2000ms sleep that blocks every tx — replace with event-driven chain confirmation
Fix latency: prepareWrite and estimateGas run sequentially — run them in parallel
Fix latency: simulateMultipleTransactionsSequential runs calls one-by-one — run them in parallel with Promise.all
Fix gas: sendTransaction retry logic catches errors thrown synchronously but wagmi's sendTransaction is async-via-mutation — errors surface in sendError state, not thrown — fix retry path
Run diagnostics and verify all clean

Fix latency: handleChainSwitch has a hardcoded 2000ms sleep that blocks every tx — replace with event-driven chain confirmation
Fix latency: prepareWrite and estimateGas run sequentially — run them in parallel
Fix latency: simulateMultipleTransactionsSequential runs calls one-by-one — run them in parallel with Promise.all
Fix gas: sendTransaction retry logic catches errors thrown synchronously but wagmi's sendTransaction is async-via-mutation — errors surface in sendError state, not thrown — fix retry path
Run diagnostics and verify all clean
